# API Checklist: Compute Distance-to-School Signals for Family Suitability

**Purpose**: Validate API requirements clarity, completeness, and coverage for school distance signals.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/010-school-distance-signals/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are request/response schemas fully specified for success, no-schools sentinel values, routing fallback, and coordinate-unresolved cases? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
- [x] CHK002 Are response fields specified for distance method used, sentinel values, and fallback indicators? [Completeness, Spec §Alternate Flows]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK003 Are school category grouping rules (elementary/secondary) explicitly defined for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [ ] CHK004 Are determinism requirements for repeated runs described for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK005 Do API requirements align with omission behavior when coordinates cannot be resolved? [Consistency, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK006 Are requirements defined for API behavior when coordinates cannot be resolved? [Coverage, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
